# Eversource Energy IT Artificial Intelligence – Intern - AI Interview Preparation

Prepare for your Eversource Energy IT Artificial Intelligence – Intern - AI internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** Norwood, MA
**Application Status:** Currently Closed

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from Eversource Energy
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

Eversource Energy is offering a IT Artificial Intelligence – Intern - AI internship position in Norwood, MA. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research Eversource Energy's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your Eversource Energy interview and increase your chances of success.
